problem: How to predict drug-receptor binding affinity from molecular structure without wet lab?
hypothesis: Combining Lattice-based cryptography for quantum resistance with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Hardware prototype with 5 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
